summary: Config.AuthHeader() returns USDA's public DEMO_KEY when no personal key is set, so the CLI works out of the box.
reason: USDA FoodData Central accepts DEMO_KEY (rate-limited ~30/hr) with no signup; applied at the credential-read point only so config credential resolution and precedence stay untouched.
validated_outcome: Keyless doctor + live search succeed on DEMO_KEY; real FDC_API_KEY still overrides.
